Subject: HMA letter: US views on EU Summit 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
Sending on behalf of HMA: 
Dear Mike,
As the UK prepares for the UK-EU Summit on 19 May, I wanted to provide 
a short note from Washington on US views and handling.
